title: TILUCK Stainless Steel Measuring Cups & Spoons Set, Cups and Spoons,Kitchen Gadgets for Cooking & Baking (Medium)
description:
About this item
[Multiple Sizes]: Including 4 Measuring cups (1/4, 1/3, 1/2, 1 cup), 6 Measuring spoons (1/8, 1/4, 1/2 , 1 tsp, 1/2, 1 tbsp). Meet All Your Needs On Cooking And Baking.
[Premium Material]: The measuring cups made of Food-Grade 18/8 Stainless Steel. The measuring spoon made of premium Food-Grade Stainless Steel.100% rust-resistant, no toxic elements, which is safe to use for both dry and wet ingredients.
[Easy Cleaning]: Stackable professional metal measuring spoons and cups set (10pcs) is dishwasher safe. Perfect solution to cheap plastic measuring sets.
[EASY TO USE]: Each measuring cup and measuring spoon have engraved clearly the size mark. No more guess in kitchen!
[Guarantee]: TILUCK offer 100% satisfaction to allow you to test it. Please feel free to contact us if you are not satisfied with our product.
reviews_5s:
I really like how these are stainless steel and not plastic. The ring that holds them all in place is so easy to click on and off. They are easily stored in my kitchen drawer! Great price and cleans easy.i have slowly been replacing things in my kitchen to make it non-toxic and this was the perfect addition to my kitchen. my absolute favorite feature of these stainless steel measuring cups is that each cup had engraved markings that can be seen on the inside as well so each cup really has 2-3 measurements. i love that this set goes down to 1/8 tsp; this is such a common measurement in recipes that not many sets have available. i do not use the rings to keep them together, i personally prefer all of my measuring cups separate but i like that these give you the option to use the rings. these cups stack easily within each other and are lightweight yet durable. i have been able to keep these smudge free which satisfies my ocd for cleanliness. i would recommend this set to everyone who frequently bakes and cooksThe TILUCK Stainless Steel Measuring Cups & Spoons Set has become an essential part of my kitchen. The stainless steel construction is sturdy and durable, ensuring long-lasting use without any rusting or bending. The measurements are clearly engraved, so there’s no worry about them fading over time.

This set includes a variety of sizes that are perfect for both cooking and baking, providing precise measurements every time. The cups and spoons stack neatly together, making storage easy and saving space in my kitchen drawer.

Overall, this set is a high-quality and reliable tool for any home cook or baker. Highly recommended for anyone looking to upgrade their kitchen gadgets!These are fantastic, easy to clean, and will not wear down like plastic would. Clear markings and stacks nicely.Seem solid and really well made. Can see the inside measurements easily. Stack compactly and they stay together nicely. Clean up well. Very happy with these.I loved how good these were and they were a good cost. Everything was grinded in so it wouldn’t wear off when washing. Great productLove these! Well-marked, quality stainless steel. Worth the price too!Well, I never thought I would be reviewing measuring spoons, but this product deserves it. Beautifully crafted in some sort of polished metal, held together with a small ring, these feel good when holding them, and look great, as well. For the money, they are great value. Would definitely recommend over plastic measuring spoon sets.Love this the even perfect measure cups I have ever used you can take a knife right a cross the cup with smoothly and is leveled love cleaning them dose not have any spots drys perfectlyThese measuring cups+spoons are worth it. I can’t ever find my plastic ones, I use them for gardening lol. But these are top tier. I haven’t owned anything like these. For my husband and I, I use them for dip, or soy sauce, the list goes on. I LOVE that the measurements are etched on them. Five stars! I would recommend.
reviews_1s: This is my first review ever, but I feel people need to know that though these seem very nice, the rims are super sharp-I have cut myself pretty badly twice now while I was washing them. They will go in the trash as I cannot trust myself to remember to be careful every time I wash them by hand!!12 days in and the half teaspoon is already rusting.Will be returning. Attempted to contact seller, but they have not responded. Two of measuring cups are out-of-round, like they were squished in the manufacturing process. This is causing the cups not to nest properly.cheaply made for the price I paidThe spoon had some potassium crystals left on it from my measuring and the crystals turned black. The picture is how it looked when I wiped it off. Hopefully no lead. I am worried 😟Measuring spoons shipped dirty as if used and unwashed. Measuring cups shipped with no ring to keep them together. Unhappily returning.Sharp edges, thin material, and they don't stack well. I returned them.I did the magnet test on this product and the magnet stuck, without fail, to both the measuring cups and the measuring spoons. This product is advertised as 18/8 stainless steel. If that were true, the magent would not stick to it. Shame on this seller for false advertising.These measure cups are as thin as a finger nail. So thin you could actual cut yourself with them. They are cheap crap and not worth what they charge. I found better ones at the dollar store, that ere strong metal. What a scam.Started to discolor and rust
